历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1576 → 1925 → 2461 → 2511 → 3975, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2025 with a drop of about 1464 places compared to 2024, a significant decline, with a baseline ranking of about 3975; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 97 → 96 → 98 → 99 → 106, with a slight annual expansion; in 2026, the plan is 104 students, a decrease of 2 (-1.9%) from 2025, a minor contraction, which slightly alleviates competition. Tongji University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 18th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with a stable position between 16th and 18th in recent years, making it a top national engineering powerhouse.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' application intentions; Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; in 2022, the civil engineering major's enrollment gap in Henan attracted widespread attention, and in 2025, the abnormal signal for the admission line was low attention, with a weakening impact; Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering experimental classes (Computer and Electronics, Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing) have high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from about 206,000 in 2021 to about 320,000 in 2025, and to about 347,000 in 2026, with continuous significant growth (an increase of about 8.4% from 2025 to 2026), intensifying competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Hunan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight contraction of the 2026 plan (alleviating competition), the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province (intensifying competition), and the negative reputation (suppressing application enthusiasm), based on the 2025 baseline of 3975, the ranking is expected to slightly move forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3910, with a range of 3441–4379.
